sections.heading: What is Fetch API & AJAX?
sections.body: Making HTTP requests from JavaScript with fetch() and async/await. This lesson covers the essential concepts you need to understand to get started effectively.

sections.heading: Key Concepts
sections.body:
Fetch API & AJAX is a fundamental concept that every developer needs to master. Here are the core ideas:

1. Core Principle: The main idea behind Fetch API & AJAX is understanding how different components work together.

2. Application: In practice, you'll use Fetch API & AJAX every day when building applications. It's one of those skills that becomes second nature.

3. Common Patterns: Most Fetch API & AJAX implementations follow predictable patterns. Once you recognize them, you can apply them quickly.

sections.heading: Why This Matters
sections.body: Understanding Fetch API & AJAX is crucial because it builds the foundation for everything that follows. Master this topic and you'll find subsequent concepts much easier to learn.
